function.message: You didn’t capture an article exactly 36 days ago. From today (2026-03-29), 36 days ago is 2026-02-21, and there is no capture with that date.

function.outcome_justification: Context set today to 2026-03-29; 36-day offset gives 2026-02-21. A name search for 2026-02-21 returned no matches, and the capture listing contains dates 2026-02-10, 2026-02-15, 2026-03-06, 2026-03-17, and 2026-03-23 only.
